programme.title: Til Death
programme.desc: When Joy heads off to spend spring break in Florida with Allison, Eddie relishes the prospect of spending a week at home alone - at least until the cable TV goes out.

programme.title: Til Death
programme.desc: The Starks are relieved when the Woodcocks start spending time with the Cofelds - until they realize that they miss them.

programme.title: Til Death
programme.desc: Joy has second thoughts after agreeing to trade responsibility for the family finances for Eddie's job as the family's cappuccino maven.

programme.title: Til Death
programme.desc: Eddie is stunned after Joy sets up his old college roommate, Webby, with her friend Denise.

programme.title: Til Death
programme.desc: When their worries over the fact that he might be dying lead Joy to want to have sex more often, Eddie doesn't want to break the spell after learning that he isn't really sick.

programme.title: Til Death
programme.desc: As Eddie and Joy square off over whether unplugging their toaster will save electricity, Jeff plans to throw a surprise birthday party for Steph.

programme.title: Til Death
programme.desc: When Jeff starts feeling suffocated by his marriage, Eddie suggests doing what he does: find something he can do without his wife, like his fake garage band.

programme.title: Til Death
programme.desc: After being virtually forced to spend a weekend with Joy and the Woodcocks at a mountain resort, Eddie is a changed man after learning that Steph dreamed about having sex with him.

programme.title: Til Death
programme.desc: A friend's 25th wedding anniversary party has Joy wondering why Eddie hasn't taken better care of her, while Jeff is forced to admit that he is embarrassed by Steph's sexually suggestive dance moves.

programme.title: Til Death
programme.desc: When Jeff is crushed to learn that Steph really doesn't like hockey, Eddie urges him to start developing interests separate from his wife's.

programme.title: Til Death
programme.desc: An unexpected break up with her boyfriend during her first holiday visit from college shows Eddie and Joy that their daughter, Allison, isn't the girl they remember.

programme.title: Til Death
programme.desc: Eddie must go up against Joy and her friend in an effort to get out of having to attend a marriage workshop.

programme.title: Til Death
programme.desc: Eddie takes Joy's advice and meets with an attractive new teacher at school, only to discover she is jealous of the time they are spending together.

programme.title: Til Death
programme.desc: Eddie and his pals decide to throw Jeff a belated bachelor party.

programme.title: Til Death
programme.desc: The Starks' spring cleaning uncovers an old roll of film with pictures of an Italian vacation twenty years ago that nearly caused them to break up.

programme.title: Til Death
programme.desc: During a Parents' Weekend at school, Eddie and Joy discover that Allison has become a ceramics major and is planning to leave school for a semester in Vermont with her teaching assistant.

programme.title: Til Death
programme.desc: When Joy heads off to spend spring break in Florida with Allison, Eddie relishes the prospect of spending a week at home alone - at least until the cable TV goes out.

programme.title: Til Death
programme.desc: The Starks are relieved when the Woodcocks start spending time with the Cofelds - until they realize that they miss them.

programme.desc: As Eddie and Joy square off over whether unplugging their toaster will save electricity, Jeff plans to throw a surprise birthday party for Steph.

programme.desc: When Jeff starts feeling suffocated by his marriage, Eddie suggests doing what he does: find something he can do without his wife, like his fake garage band.

programme.desc: As Eddie and Joy square off over whether unplugging their toaster will save electricity, Jeff plans to throw a surprise birthday party for Steph.

programme.desc: When Jeff starts feeling suffocated by his marriage, Eddie suggests doing what he does: find something he can do without his wife, like his fake garage band.

programme.title: Til Death
programme.desc: After being virtually forced to spend a weekend with Joy and the Woodcocks at a mountain resort, Eddie is a changed man after learning that Steph dreamed about having sex with him.

programme.title: Til Death
programme.desc: A friend's 25th wedding anniversary party has Joy wondering why Eddie hasn't taken better care of her, while Jeff is forced to admit that he is embarrassed by Steph's sexually suggestive dance moves.

programme.title: Til Death
programme.desc: When Jeff is crushed to learn that Steph really doesn't like hockey, Eddie urges him to start developing interests separate from his wife's.

programme.title: Til Death
programme.desc: An unexpected break up with her boyfriend during her first holiday visit from college shows Eddie and Joy that their daughter, Allison, isn't the girl they remember.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Brighton is caught smoking at school.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Jealous of Fran, C.C. tries to court favor with Maxwell's children.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran is enlisted to help land a soap opera star for Maxwell's musical.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran accidentally kills Grace's imaginary friend.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.sub-title: The Butler, The Husband, The Wife and her Mother
programme.desc: Fran persuades the family to help her dupe a nosy cousin.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran hosts a society tea for debutante Maggie.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Though excited to learn that she will be working on Christmas Day, Fran is surprised to hear that Maxwell will be producing a benefit in Washington D.C. Told that the Sheffields will celebrate Christmas one day early, Fran is further disappointed to find that Maxwell farms out all of his gift buying to a personal shopper. So, upon finding that the children don't believe in Santa and that what Grace really wants is to have her father home on Christmas, Fran decides to have a talk with Maxwell -- until Niles points out that he is preparing the staff s Christmas bonuses. Revealing that C.C. will also be joining him in Washington but insisting that their trip will be all business, Maxwell is nonetheless persuaded to do his own shopping for a change. So, when Fran relies on Niles' assessment of her bonus and buys the children some expensive gifts, she discovers that, instead of money, Maxwell bought her a beautiful vase. Faced with having to either take back her gifts or somehow pay the bill, Fran declines Niles' offer of a loan and goes to see Val's Uncle Paulie to pawn the vase. But, when Maxwell mentions it later, Fran guiltily rushes to buy it back and, forced to pay twice what she got, sells her grandmother's watch instead. Receiving a call from Niles with word about Fran and the watch, Maxwell decides to make things right. So, leaving C.C. behind at the airport, he intercepts the family at St. Patrick's Cathedral and finds Fran in a confessional seeking help with her financial difficulties. Finally, after returning the watch and then accidentally sitting on the vase, Maxwell ends up at the hospital being treated for his wounds, while Grace gets her wish and renews her belief in Santa Claus.

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran contends with Maxwell's old nanny.
